metadata.book_title: Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra Vol 2 By Maharishi Parashara

content_blocks.text: Notes: Venus is the Karaka of sex, lust and passion, status, respects, ornaments, work energy, wealth assets, marriage, cattle, musical instruments, conveyance, (horse, in ancient parlance) delightful beauty, treasure, honour, ministership, putting king under spell, occultism, tantric. Auspicious and strong Dasa of Venus, the native will have all the amenities, traits etc., signified by the planet.

आत्मबन्धुजनद्वेषं  दारवग्नादिपीडनम् ।
व्ययसायात्फलं  नष्टं  गोमहिष्यादिहानिकृत् । ।
दारपुत्रादिपीड़ा  वा  आत्मबन्धुवियोगकृत् । । ८४ १/२ । ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
आत्मबन्धुजनद्वेषं  दारवग्नादिपीडनम् ।
व्ययसायात्फलं  नष्टं  गोमहिष्यादिहानिकृत् । ।
दारपुत्रादिपीड़ा  वा  आत्मबन्धुवियोगकृत् । । ८४ १/२ । ।

content_blocks.text: Venus, in case is posited in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, in the sign of debilitation or in the sign of the 12th lord, the Dasa of Venus will produce enmity with the relatives, distress from the women folks, loss in business, cattle etc., agony to wife and children, annoyance of relatives etc.

verse_data.translation: Venus, in case is posited in the 6th, the 8th or the 12th house, in the sign of debilitation or in the sign of the 12th lord, the Dasa of Venus will produce enmity with the relatives, distress from the women folks, loss in business, cattle etc., agony to wife and children, annoyance of relatives etc.
verse_data.topic: Effects of Venus in 6th, 8th, 12th house or debilitation
Venus as lord of 9th/10th and in Ascendant/Navamsa
Venus as lord of 9th/10th and in Ascendant/Navamsa

content_blocks.text:
आनन्दाने  महत्सोख्यं  नित्यं  मिष्टान्नभोजनम् ।
उत्साहः  कीर्तिसम्पत्ती  स्त्रीपुत्रधनसम्पदः । । ८७ । ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
आनन्दाने  महत्सोख्यं  नित्यं  मिष्टान्नभोजनम् ।
उत्साहः  कीर्तिसम्पत्ती  स्त्रीपुत्रधनसम्पदः । । ८७ । ।
verse_data.topic: Venus as lord of 9th/10th and in Ascendant/Navamsa

content_blocks.text: Venus being the lord of the 9th or the 10th house and posited in the Ascendant or the 4th house, the Dasa of Venus will set in tremendous happiness and the native becomes administrator of state or village (town), his religious instinct will get stirred up and thus he will construct temples, tanks and will take pleasure in giving donation of food etc., eat sumptuous food with sweet, get enthusiastic towards his work and will have the comfort of status, wealth, assets, wife, children etc.

verse_data.translation: Venus being the lord of the 9th or the 10th house and posited in the Ascendant or the 4th house, the Dasa of Venus will set in tremendous happiness and the native becomes administrator of state or village (town), his religious instinct will get stirred up and thus he will construct temples, tanks and will take pleasure in giving donation of food etc., eat sumptuous food with sweet, get enthusiastic towards his work and will have the comfort of status, wealth, assets, wife, children etc.
verse_data.topic: Effects of Venus as lord of 9th/10th and in Ascendant/Navamsa

content_blocks.text:
स्वमुक्तो  फलमेव  स्याद्बलान्व्यानि  भुक्तिषु ।
द्वितीयधननाये  तु  देहीपीड़ा  भविष्यति । । ८८ । ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
स्वमुक्तो  फलमेव  स्याद्बलान्व्यानि  भुक्तिषु ।
द्वितीयधननाये  तु  देहीपीड़ा  भविष्यति । । ८८ । ।

content_blocks.text:
तदोषपरिहारार्थं  रुद्रां  वा  त्रयम्बकं  जपेत् ।
श्वेतां  गां  महिषीं  दयादारोग्यं  च  ततो  भवेत् । । ८९ । ।

verse_data.sanskrit_text:
तदोषपरिहारार्थं  रुद्रां  वा  त्रयम्बकं  जपेत् ।
श्वेतां  गां  महिषीं  दयादारोग्यं  च  ततो  भवेत् । । ८९ । ।

content_blocks.text: If Venus is the lord of the 2nd house, the native will suffer from diseases and distress. To get rid of these, one should worship Rudra or Tryambaka, give away a white cow or buffalo, and then he will be free from diseases.

verse_data.translation: If Venus is the lord of the 2nd house, the native will suffer from diseases and distress. To get rid of these, one should worship Rudra or Tryambaka, give away a white cow or buffalo, and then he will be free from diseases.
verse_data.topic: Effects of Venus as lord of 2nd house

raw_text:
Brihat Parasara Hora Sastra 131
predicted.
Notes: Venus is the Karaka of sex, lust and passion, status,
respects, ornaments, work energy, wealth assets, marriage, cattle,
musical instruments, conveyance, (horse, in ancient parlance) delightful
beauty, treasure, honour, ministership, putting king under spell, occultism,
tantric. Auspicious and strong Dasa of Venus, the native will have all the
amenities, traits etc., signified by the planet.

षष्ठाष्टमव्यये  शुके  नीचे  वा  व्ययराशिगे । । ८३ । ।
आत्मबन्धुजनद्वेषं  दारवग्नादिपीडनम् ।
व्ययसायात्फलं  नष्टं  गोमहिष्यादिहानिकृत् । ।
दारपुत्रादिपीड़ा  वा  आत्मबन्धुवियोगकृत् । । ८४ १/२ । ।

83-84½: Venus, in case is posited in the 6th, the 8th or the
12th house, in the sign of debilitation or in the sign of the 12th lord,
the Dasa of Venus will produce enmity with the relatives, distress
from the women folks, loss in business, cattle etc., agony to wife and
children, annoyance of relatives etc.

भाग्यकर्माधिपत्येन  लग्नवाहनराशिगे । । ८५ । ।
तदृशायी  महत्सोत्स्यं  देशग्रामधिपालता ।
देवालयतडागादिपुण्यकर्मसु  संग्रहः । । ८६ । ।
आनन्दाने  महत्सोख्यं  नित्यं  मिष्टान्नभोजनम् ।
उत्साहः  कीर्तिसम्पत्ती  स्त्रीपुत्रधनसम्पदः । । ८७ । ।

85-87: Venus being the lord of the 9th or the 10th house and
posited in the Ascendant or the 4th house, the Dasa of Venus will
set in tremendous happiness and the native becomes administrator
of state or village (town), his religious instinct will get stirred up and
thus he will construct temples, tanks and will take pleasure in giving
donation of food etc., eat sumptuous food with sweet, get enthusiastic
towards his work and will have the comfort of status, wealth, assets,
wife, children etc.

स्वमुक्तो  फलमेव  स्याद्बलान्व्यानि  भुक्तिषु ।
द्वितीयधननाये  तु  देहीपीड़ा  भविष्यति । । ८८ । ।
तदोषपरिहारार्थं  रुद्रां  वा  त्रयम्बकं  जपेत् ।
श्वेतां  गां  महिषीं  दयादारोग्यं  च  ततो  भवेत् । । ८९ । ।

88-89: If Venus is the lord of the 2nd house, the native will suffer from diseases and distress. To get rid of these, one should worship Rudra or Tryambaka, give away a white cow or buffalo, and then he will be free from diseases.
